patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/441

## Problem
`pm create --help --type Task` prints a "Type-aware option policies" block listing 19 flags as "required", but a 3-flag create succeeds in default mode. The list is actually type-APPLICABLE flags and ignores the active --create-mode. Agents over-provision creates or judge create unusable.

## Proposed fix
Help must reflect the real policy: genuinely mandatory fields for the ACTIVE create-mode (default -> --title/--type), with the full set labeled "applicable" (or "required in strict mode"). Strict mode shows the strict set.

## Definition of done
Type-aware help output matches runtime enforcement per create-mode; spec covers default vs strict rendering; contracts/help snapshots updated.
GH-441: type-aware create help mislabels applicable flags as required (ignores create-mode)

Dogfood GH-441: create help lists 19 type-applicable flags as 'required' though a 3-flag create succeeds; help must reflect the active create-mode policy. Duplicate check: searched create help required/type-aware policy — no existing item.
pm create --help --type T shows genuinely mandatory fields for the active create-mode with applicable fields labeled separately; spec covers default vs strict rendering
